prompt: In the Reminders app, open the share sheet for the existing list 'kinbench-share-234' (the list was created by setup). Right-click the list in the sidebar > Share List, or click the share icon. Don't actually invite anyone — just opening the share UI is enough. When done, write the word PASS to ~/Desktop/kinbench/234-share-confirm.txt. Fast path to create the list: `cerebellum 'reminders create_list kinbench-share-234'` (setup already did this).
